_description: Tailscale / VPN overrides for MLX-LM Mac Mini. Use this file only if MagicDNS short names don't resolve outside the tailnet. Replace the baseUrl hostname with your actual Tailscale node name or IP from 'tailscale status'.
_notes: In most Tailscale setups mac-mini.local resolves everywhere — try models-mac-mini-mlx.json first.
Use this file only if direct hostname resolution fails over Tailscale.
Replace 'your-mac-mini.tail12345.ts.net' with your actual tailnet hostname from 'tailscale status'.

models.name: Qwen3.6 35B-A3B MoE 8-bit (MLX)
models._notes: Primary workhorse — MoE with ~3.6B active params, 8-bit

models.name: Qwen3.6 27B 8-bit (MLX)
models._notes: Dense 27B — stronger reasoning and architecture review
